stemHtml: A flight was planned using a forecast wind of 340°/10 kt, a planned true airspeed (TAS) of 170 kt, a true course (TC) of 334°, and a planned magnetic heading (MH) of 331°. During the flight, the actual wind changes to 260°/15 kt. Which statement is correct?

options.a: The GS is higher + the WCA has to be increased to the left.
options.b: The GS is higher + the WCA has to be increased to the right.
options.c: The GS is lower + the WCA has to be increased to the left.
options.d: The GS is lower + the WCA has to be increased to the right.
